name: Plaid
description: Connect to Plaid to sync bank transactions, account balances, and financial data.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.description: Your Plaid client_id from Plaid Dashboard → Team Settings → Keys.

install_fields.label: Secret
install_fields.description: Your Plaid secret for the target environment (sandbox/development/production).

install_fields.label: Access Token
install_fields.description: Plaid Item access token obtained through Link flow (access-sandbox-... / access-production-...).

install_fields.label: Environment
install_fields.description: Plaid environment: sandbox, development, or production. Default: production.
